home.normalUserTitle: Take surveys, earn rewards — join as a member
home.publisherTitle: Build surveys, budgets, and your publisher workspace
home.accountHint: Sign in above based on your account type, or register below.
home.heroSub: RM Survey brings respondents, researchers, and payouts together on one secure surface — from first question to dashboard, tuned for clarity in every market you operate in.
home.localesLine: Use the language menu above — this page is available in several languages.
home.downloadApkHint: Install RM Survey on your phone
home.trustedBy: Trusted by product & research teams worldwide
home.whatWeDoSub: Four pillars — one product language from London to Lagos, whether you field or take surveys.
home.statsSub: Live completion, export-ready summaries, and a UI that stays legible for distributed teams across time zones.
statsBullets: Ship multilingual studies from one workspace
Compare segments across regions without losing nuance
Scale traffic while keeping incentives transparent
home.voicesSub: Panelists and operators in different regions — same product surface.

services.title: Research & discovery
services.text: Methodical survey design, consistent fielding, and reporting that travels well across markets.

services.title: Methodology & advisory
services.text: Questionnaire design, sampling guidance, and narrative-ready outputs for global stakeholders.

services.title: Go-to-market insight
services.text: Segment-level clarity so launches and campaigns reflect what audiences actually value.

services.title: Program delivery
services.text: End-to-end execution with timelines, ownership, and decks your leadership team can reuse.

testimonials.quote: Clear flows and predictable payouts. I take studies between meetings—works the same whether I am in APAC or on the road.
testimonials.name: Yuki T.

testimonials.quote: We run multilingual trackers in one workspace. Stakeholders in London and São Paulo see the same numbers.
testimonials.name: Marco V.

testimonials.quote: Fast field updates and a polished respondent experience. Feels closer to a global fintech app than a legacy panel.
testimonials.name: James O.

layout.footerTagline: Grow your online presence with surveys, insights, and a consistent experience on every page.

authLogin.userIdPlaceholder: The ID you chose at registration

errors.enterUserIdFirst: Enter your User ID first (at least 3 characters).
errors.pageNotLoaded: Page did not load fully. Refresh and try again.
errors.enterUserPassword: Enter your User ID and password.
errors.securityMismatch: Security token mismatch. Hard refresh (Ctrl+F5) and try again.
errors.apiNotFound: API not found. Use the same URL as APP_URL in .env, then php artisan config:clear.
errors.couldNotLogin: Could not log in. Try again.

panelist.heroSub: Earn rewards for every completed survey, build your team, and unlock multiple income streams. Activation is fast — you can start the same day.
panelist.noInviteInfo: We’ll register you as a Panelist. You can add a sponsor referral code below if you have one.

benefits.title: Earn on every survey
benefits.text: Get paid for each completed survey directly into your in-app wallet — withdraw when ready.

benefits.title: 10% direct referral income
benefits.text: Invite friends and earn a flat 10% on their qualifying activity, lifetime.

benefits.title: Team rewards
benefits.text: Build left + right legs and unlock matching, level, and panel income with daily payouts.

publisher.onboardingDesc: Publishers can create surveys, target respondents, and run analytics. Referral codes don’t apply for publisher accounts.
publisher.heroSub: Run targeted surveys, top-up your wallet, and pay respondents only for verified responses — all from a single, transparent dashboard.

features.title: Launch surveys in minutes
features.text: Build, preview, and ship targeted surveys with a step-by-step studio.

features.title: Reach the right audience
features.text: Filter respondents by tier, geography, and behaviour to get the cleanest data.

features.title: Real-time analytics
features.text: Watch responses, completion rate, and spend update live on your dashboard.

features.title: Secure crypto-ready payouts
features.text: Top-up via NowPayments, withdraw to USDT BEP-20, with full audit trail.

form.credentialsHelpSuffix: every time you sign in. This window closes automatically in
form.otpBypass: OTP bypass is on (dev only) — email code not required.
form.uidTaken: That User ID is already taken. Try another or pick a suggestion below.
form.uidInvalid: Only letters, numbers, underscore and hyphen.
form.uidError: Could not verify availability. Check your connection.
form.placementHint: Set by your invite link (left or right); the system auto-fills the next empty slot in that leg.
form.sponsorPlaceholder: Sponsor’s code if you have one
form.sponsorHint: Optional — connects you to your sponsor when the code is valid.

errors.pageNotLoaded: Page did not load fully. Refresh and try again.
errors.chooseAvailableUid: Choose a unique User ID that is available (green check).
errors.validMobile: Enter a valid mobile number with country code.

authForgot.title: Reset password
authForgot.hint: Enter your User ID, request a one-time code to your email, then choose a new password.
authForgot.hintBypass: OTP bypass is on (dev). OTP not required.
authForgot.successBody: You can now sign in with your new password.

dashboard.idActiveHint: Pay activation & minimum panel fee to become an active panelist.

supportTickets.title: Support tickets
supportTickets.subtitle: Submit your complaint or query. Our team will track it under a unique ticket ID.
supportTickets.subject: Subject

programme.title: Income programme
programme.subtitle: All core income streams and wallet tools. Rules and caps apply per page.
programme.statusBody: All six core income streams are active. Deposit, withdrawal, and terms stay linked for compliance.

activePanels.title: Active panel income
activePanels.desc: $1 activation and $10 minimum panel — unlock active panelist survey income.

subPanels.title: Sub panel income
subPanels.desc: $10 per panel, up to 9 slots — income scales $1–$9 per survey on the sub tier.

superSubPanels.title: Super panel income
superSubPanels.desc: $100 per panel, up to 9 slots — survey tier $100–$900 plus matching programme.

team.title: Team overview
team.desc: Direct list, left/right legs, matching totals, level snapshot & binary tree.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.desc: Full ledger of credits and debits.

directIncome.title: Direct income
directIncome.desc: 10% flat commission on direct referrals (eligible when active panelist).

panelMatching.title: Panel matching income
panelMatching.desc: 1:1 left/right matching on $10 panels — 10% bonus, max 20 pairs per day.

subPanelMatching.title: Sub-panel matching income
subPanelMatching.desc: Tabular matching on sub panels — up to $256 daily cap.

superSubPanelMatching.title: Super panel matching income
superSubPanelMatching.desc: $100 panel tier — same structure, higher rewards ($2,560 daily cap).

levelIncome.title: Level income
levelIncome.desc: 10 levels × 1% each from team survey earnings.

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.desc: Caps, cycles, minimums, and withdrawal rules.

walletHub.title: Wallet
walletHub.p2pNote: Internal P2P (after transfer from main only)

transactionsPage.title: Transaction history
transactionsPage.subtitle: Every credit and debit on your main wallet ledger.

team.sameLegStatsHint: Same leg statistics as the Total team table below.
team.reloadIfStatsMissing: Reload the page if statistics are missing.
team.captionActive: Active panel — team total vs last-day volume vs matching carry (updates each closing).
team.captionSub: Sub panel — team total vs last-day volume vs matching carry (updates each closing).
team.captionSuper: Super panel — team total vs last-day volume vs matching carry (updates each closing).
team.rowNoMatchToday: No match ({{date}}) — need both legs · buckets
team.rowLastDayInTeam: Last day added to team ({{date}}) — L / R
team.rowLastDayInTeamActive: Last day active panelists in team ({{date}}) — L / R
team.rowLastDayInTeamSub: Last day sub panels in team ({{date}}) — L / R
team.rowLastDayInTeamSuper: Last day super panels in team ({{date}}) — L / R
team.rowTodayLegPairs: Today ({{date}}) — {{pairs}} pairs matched · new on leg
team.rowPairsHeldInactive: Pairs on hold (inactive — match when active)
Pairs on hold (inactive — match when active)
team.inactivePanelistCarryOnly: You are not an active panelist yet. Left/right carry and pairs still update; matching income is $0 until activation + minimum panel fee are paid.
team.closingIncomeHistoryHint: Last 2 closing days only (active, sub, super per date). Inactive days show carry only.
team.matchingIncomeHint: Active = per pair (max 20/day). Sub & Super = milestone table (2, 4, 8…).
team.activeMatchingHint: 1 Left + 1 Right = 1 pair. Up to 20 pairs per day — income = pairs × per-pair rate (not milestone table).
team.subMatchingHint: Milestone table: highest tier reached by today’s matched pairs (max 20 binary pairs/day).
team.superMatchingHint: Same as sub, with super milestone amounts (×10). Max 20 binary pairs/day.
team.referralCodeHint: Your referral code is {{code}}. Tap Copy or Share to send the link.
team.referralUnavailable: Referral code is not available yet.
team.legsTableLeftTitle: Under your left child, all depths
team.legsTableRightTitle: Under your right child, all depths
